query: /* select#1 */ select coalesce(`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`SCHEMA_NAME`,'') AS `COALESCE(``schema_name``, '')`,coalesce(`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`DIGEST`,'') AS `COALESCE(``digest``, '')`,coalesce(`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`DIGEST_TEXT`,'') AS `COALESCE(``digest_text``, '')`,`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`COUNT_STAR` AS `count_star`,`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`SUM_TIMER_WAIT` AS `sum_timer_wait`,`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`QUERY_SAMPLE_TEXT` AS `query_sample_text` from `performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest` where ((`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`LAST_SEEN` >= <cache>((now() - interval 10000 second))) and (((not((`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`DIGEST_TEXT` like 'EXPLAIN %'))) and (not((`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`DIGEST_TEXT` like '/* otel-collector-ignore */%')))) or (`performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`DIGEST_TEXT` is null))) order by `performance_schema`.`events_statements_summary_by_digest`.`COUNT_STAR` desc limit 100

inputs.condition: ((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.LAST_SEEN >= <cache>((now() - interval 10000 second))) and (((not((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT like 'EXPLAIN %'))) and (not((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT like '/* otel-collector-ignore */%')))) or (performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT is null)))
inputs.operation: Filter: ((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.LAST_SEEN >= <cache>((now() - interval 10000 second))) and (((not((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT like 'EXPLAIN %'))) and (not((performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT like '/* otel-collector-ignore */%')))) or (performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.DIGEST_TEXT is null)))
Sort row IDs: performance_schema.events_statements_summary_by_digest.COUNT_STAR DESC, limit input to 100 row(s) per chunk
